title: Charcoal team-member closeout (pre-compaction checkpoint): Watchman + general-support outputs; 3 surprises; Wilma synthesis substrate landed
body:
Team-member closeout — Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 7c7327. Pre-compaction state-capture per owner direction. Session continues post-compaction; this is checkpoint shape, not full session-end. Scorched (52b263) holds closeout-owner responsibility for this team session per `start-right-team` SKILL.

## Boundary owned

Two roles across this session:

1. **Watchman** (owner-assigned at session-open ~13:50Z, concluded ~14:05Z): observation/coordination role under Director Scorched + Marshal (Seaworthy → Ashen). No source claim; pure observation surface. Watched for failure modes, blockers, idle agents; surfaced findings as directed events to Director and broadcasts as substrate where team-cadence visibility warranted.

2. **General-support** (owner-directed transition at ~14:05Z, ongoing): substantive substrate-authoring + adversarial-review dispatcher work. Peer-review on Twilit ST's FM-2 P2 plan v2; two Wilma adversarial dispatches (Class B `.claude/` authorisation pattern + Ferny's substrate-pointer pattern file).

## Outcome

**Watchman role outputs**:
- Team-start broadcast `92183937` (13:51Z) with team-state snapshot + first observations.
- Roster correction broadcast `6cda01b7` (13:53Z) — caught Seaworthy-vs-Twilit Marshal mis-attribution from stale repo-continuity prose. This catch became Instance 1 of the substrate-stale-pointer pattern Ferny is now authoring.
- Substrate broadcast `c7d65a58` (13:57Z) — named the substrate-stale-pointer-read-as-current-state class with three worked instances; first capture of the pattern that grew into the meta-recursive Director-window theme of the session.
- Director-routing-collision URGENT flag `1b05dce1` (14:02Z) — caught Scorched's ICF re-routing as substrate-stale before the collision could fire; this catch was Instance 4 in Ferny's pattern file.
- Owner-prompted silent-roster catch `9c16af43` (14:04Z) — surfaced 7 silent agents past Scorched's 14:01:58Z sweep deadline; lens-correction (sweep-named-vs-reply-author diff, not just activity-of-conversing-agents) applied to Watchman tick template before stand-down.
- Watchman cron `e1df58ec` cancelled at role-transition; all-channels watcher `b50yd2f44` remains armed.

**General-support role outputs**:
- Peer-review on Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan v2 `2e229745` (14:13Z): 5 observations + 5 strengths. One observation (Wilma question-shape on promotion criteria) maps to Scorched's later Wilma dispatch focus area.
- Wilma adversarial on Class B `.claude/rules/` authorisation pattern: synthesis directed to Scorched `caa07030` (14:19Z); substrate broadcast `1e2c83eb` (14:30Z) per Scorched authorisation. Verdict matrix: C2-near-term + C5-long-term + C4-fallback + reject-C1/C3. Wilma added C5 (context-aware authz elevation) as new candidate. Architectural-direction value preserved despite specific Class B authorisation being moot by 14:11:28Z (owner-direct override via ICF).
- Wilma adversarial on Ferny's substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state pattern file v1: synthesis directed to Ferny `9966412a` (14:30Z). Three UNSAFE verdicts (C3 false-positives on slow work; both-directions asymmetry over-generalisation; C5 cure-becomes-substrate recursion); two unaddressed failure modes (C2/C5 fighting each other; partial-state escape hatch). Pattern not emerging→stable-ready without revisions; Path A (full v2 revisions) vs Path B (surface v1 with conditions attached) offered to Ferny.
- Napkin entry appended (~line 1823) capturing the CLI-first discipline gap per owner correction at ~14:09Z (`feedback_use_built_agent_tools_only` covers HOW to invoke; doesn't cover WHEN — naming the "is there a CLI for this?" pre-query question as a structural gap).

## Evidence

All comms events listed above are in `.agent/state/collaboration/comms/`. Subagent transcripts: Wilma-on-Class-B at `a99cfb6db9cf2afee`; Wilma-on-pattern-file at `a87d0df8c0f137bae`. Napkin entry at `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md` ~line 1823. No commits authored by me.

## Claims / queue / git state

- **No active claims under my identity** (verified via direct query at session-close — Watchman + general-support are observation/coordination roles, no claim opened).
- **No commit-queue intents under my identity**.
- **No git operations** authored by me this session — pure substrate authoring + comms + napkin.
- **No closed claims to archive** — nothing was opened.

## Surprise or changed understanding

Three substantive surprises this session:

1. **The substrate-stale-pointer pattern fired through ME as well as observing it**. Owner-prompted catch at 14:03Z: I missed 7 silent agents from Scorched's sweep because I was applying activity-of-conversing-agents as the idle-lens, not silence-of-rostered-agents. Lens-error documented in event `9c16af43` + napkin. Instance 1 of the pattern (my own roster snapshot from stale repo-continuity) was on me; my catch at 14:04Z became Instance 4 in Ferny's pattern file. Watchman lens + the pattern-being-observed are not separable — the role is itself substrate to the pattern it watches.

2. **CLI-first discipline gap in `use-built-agent-tools-cli` rule**. Owner correction at ~14:09Z: "ANY time an agent constructs a query against a log we HAVE to ask 'could this be or is this already an agent CLI tool?'". Existing rule covers HOW to invoke (built artefact); doesn't cover WHEN (pre-query check). I had 8+ hand-rolled `ls | jq` queries in this session against substrate that `claims active-agents` / `comms inbox` / `claims status` would have served. Napkin entry captures the gap + verdict-shape for cure (amend the existing rule with §"When To Invoke" OR sibling rule `query-substrate-via-cli-first.md`).

3. **The Wilma-on-pattern-file verdict was substantively heavy and the pattern is not ready for stable promotion**. Wilma found three UNSAFE verdicts — C3 + C5 + Both-directions. The pattern file is a worked instance of the very class it documents (the meta-recursion); Wilma's critique sharpens the cure-shapes rather than invalidating the pattern, but the v1 needs revision before owner-coherence ratification. This is the most substantive single output of the general-support work.

## Blockers or risks

- **Wilma synthesis on Class B owner-coherence-bundle pending** (`1e2c83eb` broadcast + `caa07030` directed): Scorched is holding the owner-coherence event for Twilit ST's plan-Wilma to surface (~8-15 min remaining). My output is durable in the substrate; the bundling is Scorched's task.
- **Ferny pattern file v2 revisions pending** per Wilma's UNSAFE findings. Ferny is on Path A vs Path B decision; my output is delivered (`9966412a`). The pattern's promotion to stable status depends on substantive C3 + C5 + Both-directions revisions.
- **CLI-tags gap on `comms send`/`comms append`**: cannot set `tags: ["failure-mode", "behaviour-note"]` per ADR-183 namespace via CLI. Tag framing carried in title + body of my substrate broadcasts. Candidate CLI addition worth surfacing as `agent-tools` workspace work.
- **Owner-pending items from earlier in session** (not session-blockers but next-session pickup):
  - CLI-first rule amendment authoring (broadcast `13ad9b2d` proposal): pending owner verdict.
  - Roster-maintenance PDR draft (proposed in chat): pending owner verdict.

## Handoff needed

None to a specific next-session agent — I'm continuing as Charcoal Brazing Kiln post-compaction. The closeout-owner Scorched continues to drive Director-routing. Substantive substrate outputs are durable in comms + napkin.

Per session-handoff SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner": not running the full handoff steps; not updating repo-wide continuity surfaces; closeout-owner Scorched owns the full session handoff per `start-right-team`.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 7c7327 (team member closeout, pre-compaction checkpoint)
